posts.author: Maria Rodriguez
posts.body: Hey neighbors! 🎉 The city approved our community garden on the vacant lot at Oak & 5th. First planning meeting this Saturday at 10am at the community center. All are welcome — whether you want to grow veggies, flowers, or just hang out!

aidRequests.title: Need a ride to airport
aidRequests.desc: Flying out Tuesday morning, can anyone help with a lift?
aidRequests.author: Sophia Lee

aidOffers.title: Can help with grocery runs
aidOffers.desc: Available weekends, happy to pick up essentials.
aidOffers.author: Eric Wong

lostfound.title: Lost wallet
lostfound.desc: Black leather wallet lost near Oak & 5th on Friday.
